title: Adam Bomb destroys other field magic

card.rawText: When this card is played, destroy all other magic cards on the field. Atk: +3. Hit: +3. AL: +3. SPD: +3.

plan.title: Adam Bomb destroys other field magic
plan.summary: Play Adam Bomb while the opponent has field magic and verify it destroys other magic while Adam Bomb remains equipped.

notes: Player_2 has Ball and Chain equipped/in a magic slot before Adam Bomb is played.

steps: Inspect both magic slots and cemeteries.
manualVerification: Confirm Adam Bomb's own equipped stat suite is covered by adam-bomb-stat-suite.
riskNotes: This fixture isolates the destroy-other-magic sentence from Adam Bomb's stat modifiers.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Validate Adam Bomb destroys other field magic.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
